title: rubus hirtus var. rubiginosus
intro: Rubus hirtus var. rubiginosus, also known as the bristly raspberry, is a variety of the bristly black raspberry, a type of thorny shrub native to eastern Asia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as an antibacterial and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. rubiginosus include its potential to alleviate gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and inflammation, as well as its ability to support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves, stems, and roots can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
